TextView.android:text: Add expenses and paychecks to Google Calendar
Add, remove, or reorder spending categories
Require device unlock when opening Bujit
Remove single events after this many days
Send feedback or report an issue
Bujit is free and has no ads. If it saves you money, consider leaving a tip.
Bulk-import expenses, accounts, and balance from a file
Share or save the import template with format instructions
Permanently removes all expenses, balance, and linked accounts
